title: Phase 20.6 — Autonomous Loop Hardening + Real Page Focus + Tiny Sitemap Cleanup Test
executive_summary: Phase 20.6 audit reveals the autonomous cron loop (dcba952b4c45) is operational — both Jun 10 and Jun 11 ran automatically without manual prompting. However, three critical issues were discovered: (1) GSC data was STALE — both days reused the same June 9 baseline (499 impressions) while fresh data shows impressions declined 42% to 242. (2) Both days applied CTR/title/meta improvements to ~150-200+ thin tool variant templates — exactly the pages under Phase 20 cannibalization review. (3) The 'Manual UI correction ~716' persisted in corrected data files despite Phase 19.2 normalization policy. Corrections applied: GSC data refreshed, tool variant optimization frozen, real page focus rule established, and corrected estimate removed from official KPIs.
overall_status: OFF_TRACK — 0 clicks in 7 days (fresh data), 1 branded/homepage click in 28 days, 0 backlinks, impressions declining 42%

section_1_autonomous_proof.title: 1. Autonomous Proof Finalization
good: Cron dcba952b4c45 started automatically both days (Jun 10 15:00, Jun 11 15:14 EEST)
Phase 19 rules loaded and used both days
Work executed and saved before Telegram delivery attempt
Jun 11 daily lock correctly separated work_status and telegram_status
bad: GSC data was STALE both days — same 499-impression baseline from June 9 reused
Fresh pull shows impressions dropped 42% (242 vs 499) — cron operated on false data
June 10 daily lock record was overwritten by June 11 (only one entry preserved)
Both days applied CTR/title/meta improvements to thin tool variant templates (~150-200+ pages)
gsc-live-data-corrected.json still contains corrected ~716 estimate (violates Phase 19.2)

section_2_gsc_freshness.title: 2. GSC Freshness Proof
section_2_gsc_freshness.correction_applied: Updated gsc-api-truth-current.json, business-growth-scoreboard.json, phase19-kpi-scoreboard.json with FRESH data. Corrected ~716 estimate removed from official KPIs.

section_3_thin_freeze.title: 3. Thin Tool/Scenario Optimization Freeze
violations_found: Jun 10: 3 tool variant title improvements (mortgage, compound, investment-return) ~150+ URLs
Jun 11: 5 CTR template fixes on tool variants (loan, mortgage, investment, compound) ~150+ URLs

section_4_tool_template_risk.title: 4. Tool Template Change Risk Audit

templates_affected.mortgage_variants: ROLLBACK/SOFTEN — Revert aggressive 'Calculate YOUR Payment' title hook
templates_affected.loan_variants: SOFTEN — Revert 'What's YOUR Payment?' to descriptive title
templates_affected.investment_variants: SELECTIVE — Revert title, KEEP meta (removing final value = anti-cannibalization)
templates_affected.compound_variants: ROLLBACK — Full rollback (5 near-winners = worst cannibalization)
templates_affected.global_meta: SELECTIVE — KEEP investment-return meta, REVERT Q&A hooks on mortgage/loan/compound

section_4_tool_template_risk.action_required: Rollback/soften tool variant title templates. Keep only anti-cannibalization meta improvements.

section_5_real_page_focus.title: 5. Real Page Focus Rule
section_5_real_page_focus.verdict: RULE_ESTABLISHED — Daily execution must prioritize real pages (1-4) over thin tool/scenario variants (6)
section_5_real_page_focus.priority: 1. Real Calculators → 2. Decision Pages → 3. Guides → 4. Blogs → 5. Linkable Assets → 6. Tool/Scenario (audit only)

section_6_url_extractions.title: 6. Risky Indexing URL Extractions
section_6_url_extractions.verdict: PARTIALLY_EXTRACTED — Known patterns documented. Full URL list requires GSC Pages drilldown via CloakBrowser.
section_6_url_extractions.emergency_check: PASSED — URL Inspection API verified all important calculator/decision/blog pages are indexed (PASS). No accidental noindex or 404 on important pages.

findings.noindex_70: LOW RISK — ~50-55 from V2 formula scenario cleanup, ~10-15 tool duplicates. Likely all intentional.
findings.crawled_not_indexed_15: MEDIUM-LOW RISK — Expected thin pages Google crawled but didn't index. Verify no important pages.
findings.404_7: MEDIUM RISK — 2 new 404s. Must extract exact URLs and verify no important pages.
findings.important_discovery: compound-interest-calculator URL is UNKNOWN to Google. The correct canonical is /calculators/compound-interest.

section_7_sitemap_cleanup.title: 7. Tiny Sitemap Removal Test
section_7_sitemap_cleanup.verdict: HELD — Parent page verification required before execution
blocking_items: Parent page auto-loan-calculator needs URL inspection verification
Fresh impression data needed for loan-30k and compound-1k
Internal links from thin variants to parents must be verified
Parent pages must be verified in sitemap
section_7_sitemap_cleanup.allowed_action_only: Remove from sitemap (no noindex, canonical, redirect, delete)

section_8_parent_strengthening.title: 8. Parent Page Strengthening
section_8_parent_strengthening.verdict: PARTIALLY_STRENGTHENED — mortgage-calculator has internal links. loan-calculator and compound-interest need work.
section_8_parent_strengthening.important_discovery: compound-interest-calculator URL is UNKNOWN to Google. All internal links must point to /calculators/compound-interest (the actual canonical).

section_9_first_click_sprint.title: 9. First-Click Sprint — Real Pages Only
section_9_first_click_sprint.verdict: FOCUS_SHIFTED_TO_REAL_PAGES — 28 thin tool/scenario near-winners excluded from sprint

section_10_outreach.title: 10. Outreach V2 — Jun 13 Follow-Up Plan
section_10_outreach.verdict: PLAN_READY — Max 12 follow-ups, value-first, no backlink ask, do not send before Jun 13
section_10_outreach.status: 0 backlinks, 0 replies from 20 sent — remains biggest external growth blocker

section_11_deploy.title: 11. Deploy Status
section_11_deploy.verdict: NO_DEPLOY_NEEDED — Documentation/reporting only. No code changes in this session.
section_11_deploy.site_health: All checks pass (homepage, sitemap, robots, ads.txt, analytics)

key_discoveries: GSC data was stale 3 days straight (Jun 9-11) — 499 impressions claimed vs 242 actual (106% overstatement)
Fresh data shows impressions declining 42% across 3 consecutive windows (415→303→242)
Both autonomous runs optimized thin tool variants against cannibalization review policy
compound-interest-calculator URL is UNKNOWN to Google — correct canonical is /calculators/compound-interest
amortization-schedule is Discovered not indexed — needs diagnosis
No important pages are accidentally noindexed or 404'd (emergency check passed)
1 click in 28d is on HOMEPAGE — likely branded search, not organic content conversion
0 backlinks after 20 outreach emails — external growth requires new approach
immediate_next_actions: Fix GSC freshness: cron must pull fresh API data with date range ending yesterday (not reuse stale baseline)
Rollback/soften thin tool variant title templates (remove aggressive Q&A hooks)
Fix compound-interest-canonical URL: update all internal links to /calculators/compound-interest
Verify auto-loan-calculator parent page is healthy before any sitemap removal
Strengthen loan-calculator and compound-interest parent pages (title/meta/FAQ/internal links)
Continue first-click sprint on real pages only (blog 20000-loan is highest priority at pos 11.9)
Prepare Jun 13 outreach follow-ups (max 12, value-first, no backlink ask)
Extract exact 404 URLs via GSC Pages drilldown to identify the 2 new 404s
Diagnose amortization-schedule (discovered not indexed) — improve content or add internal links
